---
title: "Creating An Idp Project"
---

You can create a project by entering a project name and a description. After the project is created, the IDP configuration process is initiated.

1.  In the left navigation pane, under IDP Configuration, click All IDP projects. A list of existing IDP projects are displayed.
2.  Click Create Project. The Create IDP Project dialog box is displayed.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)  Note: To rename the project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Edit project name option.
3.  Enter a Project name and a (optional) Project description.
4.  Click Create Project. The project is created and the Choose Files page is displayed.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
- To upload an existing project .zip file into the Modeler application, click Upload Project.
Tip:
You can select the Save as new project option to save a copy of a project by clicking the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page. You need to enter a new name for the project you want to copy.

- To add or remove a project from favorites, click the star icon next to the relevant project.
- To view the list of favorite projects, under IDP Configuration, click Favorite IDP projects.
- To rename the project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Edit project name option.
- To delete a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Delete project option.
- To download a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Download project option. The project is downloaded in a .zip file format.
- To add collaborators to a project, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Collaborators option.
- To configure document processing, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the Document Processing option. For more information, refer to the Configuring Document Processing section.
- To view a project's released version, click the ellipsis next to the relevant project on the All IDP projects page and then select the View project releases. option.
